name: evidence aggregator blocks promotion when supporting PRs span fewer than two distinct organizations
command: printf '{"pattern_id":"p2","supporting_prs":[{"number":1,"org":"a","tier":1},{"number":2,"org":"a","tier":1},{"number":3,"org":"a","tier":1}]}\n' > pat.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/aggregate-evidence.sh" --pattern pat.json 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'organizations_count=1' err.txt && grep -q 'required>=2' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
